news.paragraph: Recent news for TLT presents a mixed outlook as a stronger-than-expected April jobs report may delay Federal Reserve rate cuts, creating potential headwinds for long-term bonds. However, the ETF recently saw significant inflows of $153 million and some analysts point to seasonal tailwinds for 10 and 30-year Treasuries. Traders should closely monitor Federal Reserve policy shifts as the primary driver for price movement.
